name: cdxcore
description: Read-only MCP startup and configuration diagnostics for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose MCP startup and config problems without editing files.
interface.longDescription: CDXCore inspects Codex MCP configuration and profiles configured stdio MCP server startup with bounded, read-only diagnostics.
interface.defaultPrompt: Diagnose my Codex MCP configuration with CDXCore.
